name: IndusInd Legend Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 6 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on travel and dining
2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all other purchases

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: Complimentary golf rounds at select courses
Exclusive dining privileges at partner restaurants
pros: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access
Strong 6X rewards on travel and dining spends
Comprehensive air accident and travel insurance
Annual fee waiver at ₹5L spend is achievable for target segment
cons: High joining and annual fee of ₹10,000
Base reward rate of 2 RP/₹100 is average for a super-premium card
Point value of ₹0.50 is lower than some competitors
Limited milestone benefits compared to peers
idealFor: Frequent travellers seeking unlimited lounge access
High spenders with annual spend exceeding ₹5 lakhs
Users who value travel and dining rewards

faqs.question: How do I apply for the IndusInd Legend Credit Card?
faqs.answer: You can apply online via the IndusInd Bank website or visit a branch. The card requires a minimum annual income of ₹20 lakhs and is subject to credit approval.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable on the Legend card?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹10,000 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: What lounge access does the Legend card provide?
faqs.answer: The Legend card offers unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge access via Priority Pass for the primary cardholder.

faqs.question: Can I convert reward points to airmiles?
faqs.answer: Yes, IndusInd Legend reward points can be converted to airline miles with partner airlines. Check the IndusInd rewards portal for current conversion ratios.
